titleStmt.title: The Minister in Switzerland ( (Wilson) ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Minister in Switzerland ( Wilson ) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
338. I have this evening received a communication addressed to the Secretary of State by the President of the Committee of Coordination reading as follows:
“Sir: As President of the Committee of Coordination of measures to be taken under article 16 of the Covenant I have the honor to transmit herewith to states non-members of the League, in accordance with the decision of the Coordination Committee formed as the result of the recommendation adopted by the Assembly on October 10, the principal recent documents in the Italo-Ethiopian dispute, including the minutes of the Council of October 7,Minutes of the 89th session of the Council, League of Nations, Official Journal, November 1935, p. 1173. the minutes of the Assembly of October 9 to 11 Ibid., Special Supplements Nos. 145–150. and the recommendations of the Coordination Committee. Ibid., Special Supplement No. 145, pp. 7 ff.
I am instructed to add that the Governments represented on the Coordination Committee would welcome any communication which any non-member state may deem it proper to make to me, or notifications of any action which it may be taking in the circumstances.
I have the honor to be, Sir, your obedient servant, Augusto de Vasconcellos, President of the Committee.”
The documents attached to this communication are as follows:
[Here follows list of League Documents previously submitted to the Department.]
Texts being mailed Steamship Berengaria Ocober 23.
